'''yadhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:juramentally|juramentally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-dh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:juramentally|juramentally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yadhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yadhate|yadhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yadhatesher|yadhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadhatesherĂ«m|yadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yadhatero|yadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yadhateshĂ«|yadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadhateshĂ«m|yadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyadhatero|gokiyadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyadhateshĂ«|gokiyadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyadhateshĂ«m|gokiyadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyadhankerom|goyadhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyadhankeshĂ«|goyadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyadhankeshĂ«m|goyadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyadhankeya|goyadhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yadhaterom|yadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadhatemu|yadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yadhateya|yadhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyadhaterom|gokiyadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyadhatemu|gokiyadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyadhateya|gokiyadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yadhadhate|yadhadhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yadhadhatesher|yadhadhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadhadhatesherĂ«m|yadhadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yadhadhatero|yadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yadhadhateshĂ«|yadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadhadhateshĂ«m|yadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyadhadhatero|gokiyadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyadhadhateshĂ«|gokiyadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyadhadhateshĂ«m|gokiyadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyadhadhankerom|goyadhadhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyadhadhankeshĂ«|goyadhadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyadhadhankeshĂ«m|goyadhadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyadhadhankeya|goyadhadhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yadhadhaterom|yadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadhadhatemu|yadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yadhadhateya|yadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyadhadhaterom|gokiyadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyadhadhatemu|gokiyadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyadhadhateya|gokiyadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠdhĂŠte|yĂŠdhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠdhĂŠtesher|yĂŠdhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠdhĂŠtero|yĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠdhĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠdhĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠdhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠdhĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠdhĂŠnkeya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠdhĂŠtemu|yĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠdhĂŠteya|yĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠdhĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠdhĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠdhĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafdhafte|yafdhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafdhaftesher|yafdhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafdhaftesherĂ«m|yafdhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafdhaftero|yafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafdhafteshĂ«|yafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafdhafteshĂ«m|yafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafdhaftero|gokiyafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafdhafteshĂ«|gokiyafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafdhafteshĂ«m|gokiyafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafdhafnkerom|goyafdhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafdhafnkeshĂ«|goyafdhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafdhafnkeshĂ«m|goyafdhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafdhafnkeya|goyafdhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafdhafterom|yafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafdhaftemu|yafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafdhafteya|yafdhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafdhafterom|gokiyafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafdhaftemu|gokiyafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafdhafteya|gokiyafdhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
